channel.title: hamburger on Eric Silva
channel.description: Recent content in hamburger on Eric Silva
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

item.title: Best Classic Meatloaf
item.description: Author: Amanda Finks Source: https://www.thewholesomedish.com/the-best-classic-meatloaf/ Ingredients 1 lb. lean ground beef 1 cup dried bread crumbs 1/2 cup diced yellow onion 1/2 cup milk 1 large egg beaten 2 tbsp. ketchup 1 tbsp. Worcestershire sauce 1 tsp. dried parsley leaves 3/4 tsp. salt 1/2 tsp. garlic powder 1/4 tsp. ground black pepper For the Topping: 1/4 cup ketchup 2 tbsp. packed light brown sugar 1 tbsp. red wine vinegar Directions Preheat oven to 350°F.

item.title: Stuffed Bell Pepper Stew
item.description: Author: Chelsey Janes Source: https://50campfires.com/stuffed-bell-pepper-soup-dutch-oven/ Ingredients 1 lb. ground beef 1 cup uncooked instant rice 2 cups beef broth 1 green pepper, diced 1 red pepper, diced 1 onion, minced 1 tbsp garlic, minced 12 oz. can tomato sauce 28 oz. can diced tomatoes with green chiles, un-drained salt and pepper to taste Directions In your dutch oven, brown ground beef, onion, garlic and peppers. Add salt and pepper to taste.
